metadata.name: vesting
metadata.description: Velthoryn — Merkle-compressed Solana token distribution with vesting and clawback

accounts.name: mint
docs: Classic SPL Token mints only — Token-2022 mints are rejected to avoid
silent transfer-fee deductions. The constraint verifies the mint account
is owned by the classic Token program rather than Token-2022.

accounts.name: mint
docs: Classic SPL Token mints only — Token-2022 mints are rejected to avoid
silent transfer-fee deductions. The constraint verifies the mint account
is owned by the classic Token program rather than Token-2022.

errors.name: EmptyRoot
errors.msg: Merkle root must not be all-zero

errors.name: EmptyCampaign
errors.msg: Campaign must contain at least one leaf

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: MissingCancelAuthority
errors.msg: Cancellable campaigns require a cancel_authority

errors.name: SameRoot
errors.msg: New root must differ from the current root

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorised for this action

errors.name: OverFunded
errors.msg: Vault would exceed the declared total_supply

errors.name: MintMismatch
errors.msg: Mint of provided account does not match the campaign mint

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: CampaignPaused
errors.msg: Campaign is paused

errors.name: UnauthorizedClaimer
errors.msg: Signer does not own this leaf

errors.name: InvalidSchedule
errors.msg: Leaf has malformed schedule (start <= cliff <= end violated)

errors.name: InvalidScheduleType
errors.msg: release_type must be 0 (Cliff), 1 (Linear), or 2 (Milestone)

errors.name: InvalidProof
errors.msg: Merkle proof did not verify against the stored root

errors.name: MilestoneAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: This milestone has already been claimed

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: Nothing claimable at this time

errors.name: InsufficientVault
errors.msg: Vault does not hold enough tokens for this claim

errors.name: OverClaim
errors.msg: Total claimed would exceed campaign total_supply

errors.name: WrongVault
errors.msg: Provided vault account does not match the campaign vault

errors.name: NotCancellable
errors.msg: Campaign was created as non-cancellable

errors.name: AlreadyCancelled
errors.msg: Campaign is already cancelled

errors.name: NotPausable
errors.msg: Campaign was created with no pause_authority

errors.name: AlreadyPaused
errors.msg: Campaign is already paused

errors.name: CampaignCancelled
errors.msg: Cancelled campaigns cannot be paused, unpaused, or rotated

errors.name: NotPaused
errors.msg: Campaign is not paused

errors.name: CampaignCompleted
errors.msg: Completed campaigns cannot be paused, unpaused, or cancelled

errors.name: NotCancelled
errors.msg: Campaign is not cancelled

errors.name: GracePeriodActive
errors.msg: Grace period after cancellation has not expired

errors.name: CannotClose
errors.msg: ClaimRecord cannot be closed yet (not fully claimed and grace period active)

errors.name: NotSingleStream
errors.msg: This instruction only works on single-recipient streams

errors.name: ProofTooLong
errors.msg: Merkle proof exceeds maximum allowed length for this campaign

errors.name: FullyVested
errors.msg: Campaign is fully vested; cannot cancel

errors.name: StreamExpired
errors.msg: Stream schedule has ended; nothing left to claim

errors.name: MilestoneNotReleased
errors.msg: Milestone has not been released by the creator

errors.name: MilestoneAlreadyReleased
errors.msg: Milestone has already been released

errors.name: InstantRefundedCampaign
errors.msg: Campaign was instant-refunded; no further claims or releases allowed

errors.name: CampaignAlreadyStarted
errors.msg: Campaign has already started; instant refund is not allowed

errors.name: NativeSolVaultNotEmpty
errors.msg: Native SOL vault still holds lamports after final drain

errors.name: NativeSolRentViolation
errors.msg: Native SOL transfer would drop PDA below rent-exempt minimum

errors.name: UnsupportedMint
errors.msg: Token-2022 mints are not supported; use classic SPL Token

errors.name: NotMultiLeafCampaign
errors.msg: Instant refund is only allowed on multi-leaf campaigns

fields.name: total_entitled
docs: Total entitled from the Merkle leaf. Set once at first claim.
Used by close_claim_record to verify full vesting without trusting
NOTE: Adding this field is a layout-breaking change. Existing
on-chain ClaimRecords predating this field cannot be deserialized
correctly and require a migration (e.g. resize + fill or close + re-claim).

fields.name: milestone_released_flags
docs: Creator-controlled release flags for milestone leaves (bit = milestone_idx).

fields.name: min_cliff_time
docs: Minimum cliff time across all leaves in the current Merkle root.
Indexer/parsers must be updated when `VestingTree` layout changes.

fields.name: instant_refunded
docs: True only when a multi-leaf campaign was cancelled via instant refund.
